title: Contractor 007 long England parcel-group and source scaffold pipeline
scope: Long read-only contractor pipeline scaffold. Generate 200 England parcel groups, contractor row templates, group match templates, official source plan, DB/table preflight manifest. No fake contractor rows. No database writes. No production deploy.
self_correction_rules: If git pull or push blocks, keep local heartbeat and continue partial outputs.
If contractor root is missing, create folder structure and continue.
If DB env is missing, mark env_CONTRACTOR_DATABASE_URL_present=false and do not connect.
If real contractor sources are missing, do not create fake contractor rows; write templates only.
Write heartbeat/progress notes so next continuation can distinguish slow work from a hang.
